title: TopBuild Leadership in Spray Foam Insulation Market and Competitive Position
text:
TopBuild Corp. Market Position in Spray Foam Insulation Sector:

Market Size and Outlook:
The spray foam insulation market is expected to reach a valuation of USD 2,181.5 million in 2025, and is projected to reach USD 4,452.1 million by 2035. Closed-cell spray foam is projected to lead product demand with a 61% share in 2025, while residential applications are expected to dominate end-use with a 45% share.

Market Share Leadership:
TopBuild holds the largest market share in the residential insulation installation market at approximately 30%, followed by Installed Building Products (IBP) with roughly 15% market share. In the insulation installation market, TopBuild's TruTeam business faces competition from large national contractors such as IBP, regional firms like Comfort Systems USA, and numerous local contractors.

Pricing Dynamics:
There has been fluctuating spray foam pricing, variability in single-family housing activity, and a quicker than anticipated reduction in multi-family project backlogs. Continuous pricing pressures characterize the installation services market.

Competitive Differentiation:
TopBuild differentiates through technological investments and specialized installation expertise, with an average gross margin in installation services of 24.6%, demonstrating pricing power despite competitive pressures.
